title: senecio ruthenensis
intro: Senecio ruthenensis, also known as White Hawk's Beard or Wormwood of the Caucasus, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Senecio ruthenensis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
